message: The total size of the 3 globals exported for future expression (‘FUN()’) is 566.06 MiB. This exceeds the maximum allowed size 500.00 MiB per by R option "future.globals.maxSize". This limit is set to protect against transfering too large objects to parallel workers by mistake, which may not be intended and could be costly. See help("future.globals.maxSize", package = "future") for further explainations and how to adjust or remove this threshold There are three globals: ‘FUN’ (284.43 MiB of class ‘function’), ‘data.use’ (281.62 MiB of class ‘S4’) and ‘j’ (133 bytes of class ‘numeric’)
